senses.definition: things that people and animals eat, such as meat or vegetables

examples.x: He enjoyed trying new foods while traveling abroad.
I like to explore different cultures through their traditional foods.
She always tries to choose healthy and nutritious foods.
The children were hungry and eagerly devoured their food.

senses.definition: the flesh of animals and birds that we can eat as food

examples.x: Grilled chicken breast is a lean and flavorful meat option for a healthy dinner.
I bought a pound of fresh meat from the butcher.
She cooked the meat on low heat to ensure it was tender and moist.
She seasoned the meat with herbs and spices before cooking.
Slow-cooked pulled pork, served with barbecue sauce, is a popular meat dish.

senses.definition: flesh from a fish that we use as food

examples.x: He used white fish to make fish and vegetable stir-fry for a healthy dinner.
She cooked a mouthwatering fish curry, spiced with fragrant herbs and served over steamed rice.
She grilled the fish to perfection, sprinkling it with herbs and lemon for a fresh and zesty flavor.
The fish tacos were topped with tangy slaw and creamy sauce.

senses.definition: the flesh of a chicken that we use as food

examples.x: I made a comforting chicken noodle soup to warm up on a cold day.
She prepared a flavorful chicken curry with aromatic spices and coconut milk.
The restaurant served juicy grilled chicken burgers with all the toppings.

senses.definition: a plant or a part of it that we can eat either raw or cooked

examples.x: Fresh vegetables like tomatoes, cucumbers, and lettuce make a delicious salad.
Grilled vegetable skewers are a crowd-pleasing appetizer at summer cookouts.
I always start my day with a nutritious vegetable omelette packed with spinach, tomatoes, and mushrooms.
I tossed the roasted vegetables with olive oil and a sprinkle of salt and pepper.
The restaurant offered a vegetarian dish with a mix of seasonal vegetables.

senses.definition: a long fruit that has thin green skin and is used a lot in salads

examples.x: He discovered the soothing properties of cucumber slices on his tired eyes after a long day.
I added cucumber to my homemade green smoothie for extra hydration.
We made a refreshing cucumber salsa with tomatoes, onions, and cilantro.
You should try a Greek salad with cucumbers, tomatoes, feta cheese, and a tangy dressing.

senses.definition: a round vegetable that grows beneath the ground, has light brown skin, and is used cooked or fried

examples.x: He used leftover mashed potatoes to make cheesy potato croquettes.
I roasted potatoes with garlic and rosemary.
I sliced the potatoes into thin rounds and made homemade potato chips.
The farmer harvested a basket of potatoes from the field, satisfied with a successful yield.
The street vendor sold hot and crispy potato fries.

senses.definition: a round vegetable with many layers and a strong smell and taste

examples.x: She accidentally grabbed the onion instead of the apple from the fruit bowl and took a crunchy bite.
She reached for the onion in the pantry and noticed it was sprouting, so she decided to plant it in her garden.
They pickled onions to enjoy as a tangy garnish for sandwiches and salads.

senses.definition: a soft and round fruit that is red and is used a lot in salads and many other foods

examples.x: He made a tomato and avocado salad with a zesty lemon dressing.
I can't imagine living without tomatoes; they add so much freshness and flavor to my meals.
She diced the tomato and mixed it with avocado, cilantro, and lime juice to make a refreshing salsa.
The farmers harvested the ripe tomatoes from the farm before they spoiled.

senses.definition: a long orange vegetable that grows beneath the ground and is eaten cooked or raw

examples.x: He pretended the carrot was a microphone and sang a silly song in front of the mirror.
The children snacked on carrot chips instead of potato chips.
They fed the carrot to their pet rabbit, who happily munched on it.
We went to the farmer's market and bought a bunch of fresh carrots to make carrot cake.

senses.definition: a powder made from dried peppercorn that is added to food to make it spicy

examples.x: As a chef, I always make sure to have freshly ground pepper on hand to elevate the flavors of my dishes.
She made a colorful pepper and cheese omelet for breakfast.

senses.definition: something we can eat that grows on trees, plants, or bushes

examples.x: For a refreshing summer treat, try blending frozen fruit, like bananas and berries, into a creamy smoothie.
He made a smoothie with a blend of frozen fruits.
I bought a variety of fresh fruits from the grocery store.
Sliced watermelon is a juicy and hydrating fruit to enjoy on a hot summer day.

senses.definition: a fruit that is round and has thin yellow, red, or green skin

examples.x: Can you please pass me that shiny red apple?
I ate a delicious apple for a healthy snack.
I placed the shiny red apple in the basket.
My daughter was trying to pick a ripe apple from the tree.

senses.definition: a fruit that is juicy and round and has thick skin

examples.x: Orange slices make a healthy and tasty snack.
The children loved eating orange slices as a natural and healthy snack.
The market had ripe oranges with bright orange peels.
They peeled and separated the orange segments to make a fruit salad.

senses.definition: a purple or green fruit that is round, small, and grows in bunches on a vine

examples.x: A teaspoon of grape vinegar brightened up the tomato soup, giving it a pleasant tang.
I ate a handful of sweet grapes for a refreshing snack.
I enjoy relaxing with a glass of red wine made from the finest grapes.
She packed a small bag of grapes in her lunchbox for school.

senses.definition: a soft fruit that is long and curved and has hard yellow skin

examples.x: Bananas are my go-to ingredient for making a creamy and delicious smoothie in the morning.
I start my day with a ripe banana, sliced over a bowl of yogurt and granola.
My mom peeled a ripe banana for me.
She added sliced bananas to her cereal for a sweet and creamy taste.
They froze sliced bananas and blended them into a creamy banana ice cream.

senses.definition: a soft and juicy fruit that has a pit in the middle and its skin has extremely little hairs on it

examples.x: He shared a juicy peach with his friend during a picnic in the park.
I bit into a ripe peach and enjoyed its sweet flesh.
Peaches are packed with antioxidants that help protect your body against harmful free radicals.
She enjoyed a ripe peach for a refreshing summer snack.
The pie recipe calls for fresh peaches to give it a sweet and fruity flavor.

senses.definition: a juicy sour fruit that is round and has thick yellow skin

examples.x: He added a squeeze of lemon to his fish tacos for a citrusy twist.
He made a pitcher of homemade lemonade with freshly squeezed lemons.
Lemon chicken is a flavorful dish that combines the juiciness of chicken with the tanginess of lemons.
The market had vibrant yellow lemons on display.

senses.definition: the white liquid we get from cows, sheep, or goats that we drink and use for making cheese, butter, etc.

examples.x: I poured a glass of cold milk to accompany my freshly baked chocolate chip cookies.
Milk is a good source of calcium, which helps in building strong bones and teeth.
She added a splash of milk to her coffee for a creamy taste.
The creamy pasta sauce was made with a combination of milk and grated cheese.

senses.definition: a soft or hard food made from milk that is usually yellow or white in color

examples.x: Sprinkling Parmesan cheese over pasta dishes adds a savory touch.
They enjoyed a slice of mozzarella cheese with their fresh tomato and basil salad.

senses.definition: a soft, yellow food made from cream that we spread on bread or use in cooking

examples.x: Butter is a key ingredient in making flaky and delicious pie crusts.
Drizzle melted butter over freshly popped popcorn for a tasty movie snack.
He melted butter in a saucepan to make a savory garlic butter sauce.
Spread some melted butter on warm toast for a simple and comforting breakfast.
The recipe called for melted butter to be drizzled over the freshly baked bread.

senses.definition: an oval or round thing that is produced by a chicken and can be used for food

examples.x: I love having a sunny-side-up egg on my avocado toast.

senses.definition: the thick, fatty part of milk that rises to the top when you let milk sit

examples.x: He stirred cream into his pasta sauce to make it rich and creamy.
The chef drizzled cream over the warm apple pie.
